title: CARE framework gray-zone counter-strategy + red-team critique
public_claim: This is the original-framework counterpart to the Russia assessment writing sample — a short submission-grade paper that proposes a new analytic framework ("Counter-Ambiguity and Reflexive Erosion", acronym CARE) for undermining Russian gray-zone advantage.
distinctive_mechanism: The mechanism is professional-evidence curation: keep career-facing materials limited, unclassified, role-appropriate, and tied to concrete work products without exposing private or unsuitable application material.
use_value: It makes adversarial language and influence mechanisms inspectable by separating phrase, channel, target perception, amplification path, and judgment effect.
